name: semipy-vscode
description: Editor support for semipy semiformal specs (#> / #<), portal history, and dispatch navigation.
author: Ryan Yen

commands.title: Semipy: View generated code for commit
Semipy: Switch slot version (rewind spec + implementation)
Semipy: Lock slot to a specific commit

semipy.debounceMs.description: Debounce for reloading .semiformal artifacts and refreshing decorations.

semipy.linkedHighlightFadeMs.description: Duration before linked split-view highlights fade.

semipy.signFlipOnSkeletonEdit.description: When you edit text on a #< line, rewrite the prefix to #> (user-owned spec).

semipy.signFlipSkipApiEdits.description: Do not sign-flip on TextDocumentChangeReason.Api (programmatic edits such as tools writing #< lines).

semipy.enableCodeLens.description: Show Semipy commit/version CodeLens above @semiformal functions.

semipy.enableInlayHints.description: Show last resolution (decision, commit id) as inlay hints on spec lines.

semipy.enableSpecLineSyntax.description: Paint #> / #< marker and body colors via editor decorations (reliable even when TextMate injection is overridden by Python/Pylance).

semipy.tracePhraseDecorations.description: Append phrase/binding resolution details to Output > Semipy (enable when debugging pattern-learning highlights).

semipy.sessionSource.description: Absolute path matching semipy configure(session_source=...). Use ${workspaceFolder} when the portal is keyed to the opened folder (e.g. examples/).

semipy.pythonPath.description: Absolute path to python for `python -m semipy` (lock, unlock, rollback). May use ${workspaceFolder}. When empty, uses a workspace `.venv`/`venv` if present, then the Python extension interpreter. Set in Settings JSON under key `semipy.pythonPath` (UI "@ext:" search only finds marketplace IDs).

scripts.test:slot-anchor: tsc --module commonjs --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution node --outDir .test-emit --rootDir src --strict false --declaration false src/features/slotAnnotations/slotLineResolve.ts src/data/portalLoader.ts src/features/splitEditor/correspondenceMap.ts && node test/slotLineResolve.test.js
